nly in a more broadly accessible way. In any event, the O.M.B. gig didn=E2=
=80=99t work out; at the time, Marc couldn=E2=80=99t easily disentangle him=
self from his various Apollo obligations and conflicts.<br/><br/>Eight year=
s later, for whatever reasons, Marc was

tation. =E2=80=9CYou can make this bet=
ter,=E2=80=9D Marc told him, according to someone familiar with that conver=
sation. =E2=80=9CI=E2=80=99m rooting for you.=E2=80=9D <br/><br/>In Marc=E2=

ting <b>Kamala Harris</b>=E2=80=94the choice  between fear of change or fea=
